name: IdsEdwGrpMdlPolProdDExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte1 AS (SELECT T.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_SK, T.GRP_ID, T.MDL_DOC_ID, T.POL_NO, T.CNTR_ID, T.CERT_ID, T.AMNDMNT_ID, T.PROD_ID, T.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_EFF_DT, T.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.GRP_SK, T.MDL_POL_AMNDMNT_SK, T.MDL_POL_CERT_SK, T.MDL_POL_CNTR_SK, T.PROD_SK, T.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_TERM_DT FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD AS T WHERE T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK >= @{pipeline().parameters.IDSRunCycle}) SELECT cte1.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_SK, cte1.GRP_ID, cte1.MDL_DOC_ID, cte1.POL_NO, cte1.CNTR_ID, cte1.CERT_ID, cte1.AMNDMNT_ID, cte1.PROD_ID, cte1.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_EFF_DT, cte1.SRC_SYS_CD, cte1.GRP_SK, cte1.MDL_POL_AMNDMNT_SK, cte1.MDL_POL_CERT_SK, cte1.MDL_POL_CNTR_SK, cte1.PROD_SK, cte1.GRP_MDL_POL_PROD_TERM_DT, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycleDate} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, @{pipeline().parameters.EDWRunCycle} AS LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, cte1.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK AS IDS_LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM cte1
